title: senecio motelayi
intro: Senecio motelayi, also known as Mexican fireweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Senecio motelayi include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
